重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with your feet very wide apart and toes outwards. Squat down with arms extended to hold the bar with a shoulder width grip, one overhand and one underhand.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the barbell until standing up straight.  2. Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2. Move the bar vertically.
3. Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4. Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5. Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell across your back shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Rotate your torso to one side while keeping your lower body still.
2. Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly.
3. Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place the bar on the back of your shoulders and bend arms to hold it with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Bend at your waist and squeeze obliques to one side as far as possible.
2. Hold for a few seconds, return to the starting position and repeat.
3.  Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head up throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place the bar on the back of your shoulders and bend arms to hold it with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Bend at your waist and squeeze obliques to one side as far as possible.
2. Hold for a few seconds, return to the starting position and repeat.
3. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head up throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at the waist with your back and legs straight and hold a barbell in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the barbell until standing up straight.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Move the bar vertically.
2. Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
3. Keep your legs straight but do not lock your knees.
4. Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5. Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell in an overhand grip at shoulder width in front of your hips with arms extended.
動作要領:
1. Raise your elbows up and out to the sides until the bar is at your chin level.
2. Contract your shoulders and hold for a few seconds.
3. Lower the bar to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your hands moving vertically.
2. Keep your elbows higher than your forearms during the exercise.
3. Keep the bar close to your body.
4. Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Put your feet under the bar. Bend down and crouch to grip the bar with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2.  Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly.
3.  Accelerate the bar upward towards your chest.
4. Quickly move the bar down to your thighs with your body totally upright.
5. Slowly return the bar to the starting point and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not pull the bar using your arms.
2. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a barbell on your shoulders behind you with your hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1. Descend your body to a squat position while extending your arms to press the barbell over your head.
2. Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
3. Lower the barbell to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not flare your elbows out.
2. Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
3. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
4. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
5. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Put your feet under the bar. Bend down to grip the bar with a wider than shoulder width and in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2. Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar while lifting the barbell overhead with palms facing forward.
3.  As you lift the barbell, lower your hips to a front squat position.
4.  Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
5. Lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: Sit on the bench with feet together on the floor. Hold a barbell and rest it on your thighs.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and slowly raise your heels up as high as possible.
2. Inhale, lower heels to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head, spine and neck in line and body balanced during the exercise.
2. Keep pressing the barbell against your knees during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Do not rest the barbell on your shoulders.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Squat down in front of the bar with your feet wider than shoulder width apart and hold it with a narrow overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Lift the bar as extending your arms to the height above your knees.
2. Retract your shoulder blades, lift your chest up and flex your elbows to bring the bar to the height of your chin.
3.  Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. Keep your hips and shoulders rising at the same rate.
3. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Squat down in front of the barbell with your feet shoulder width apart. Hold it in an overhand grip wider than the shoulder width and arms extended.
動作要領:
1. Squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats.
2. Exhale and lift the barbell until standing up straight.
Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3.  Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2. Move the bar vertically.
3. Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4. Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5. Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a bar in an overhand grip with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep your upper arms still during the exercise.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Take a wide stance with toes pointed outward. Hold the barbell on the back of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4. ﻿﻿Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the bar with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart in an overhand grip and arms extended.
動作要領:
1. Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2. Once the barbell passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
3. ﻿﻿As you receive the barbell, lower your hips to a front squat position.
4. ﻿﻿Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
5. ﻿﻿Lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart in an overhand grip and arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Shrug your shoulders to lift the barbell with your arms straight.
2. Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar while lifting the barbell overhead with palms facing forward.
3. ﻿﻿As you lift the barbell, lower your hips to a front squat position.
4. ﻿﻿Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
5. ﻿﻿Lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 下斜板凳臥推 (寬距)  -槓鈴
重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet secured under the footpads. Hold the barbell above your chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2.  Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet secured under the footpads. Hold the barbell over your chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2. Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a barbell using an shoulder width overhand grip and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale to lower your arms in an arc behind your head until your arms are in line with your torso.
2. ﻿﻿Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale to pull the barbell in arc over your head until your arms are vertical to your body.
4. ﻿﻿Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell using a close overhand grip at shoulder width and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale to bend your elbows and lower your arms in an arc behind your head.
2. ﻿﻿Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale to pull the barbell in arc over your head until your arms are vertical to your body.
4. ﻿﻿Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作:
Sit on a bench and rest your forearms on the thighs with the wrists ahead of the knees.
Hold the barbell in both hands with an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and curl your wrists up.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds at the top position.
3. ﻿﻿Inhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your thighs and forearms parallel to the floor.
2. Keep your elbows and wrists at the same height during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: Stand and hold the barbell on your shoulders with palms facing forward. Place the toes and the balls of your feet shoulder width apart onto a platform.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Elevate your heels slowly as high as possible.
2. ﻿﻿Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep your head, spine and neck in line.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 臀橋 (雙腳置於板凳上) -槓鈴
重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Lie with knees bent and heels on the bench.
Hold a bar in a wide overhand grip and place it over the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Press your heels to lift hips up until your body forms a straight line from your shoulders to your knees.
2. ﻿﻿Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3. ﻿﻿Lower back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie with knees bent and feet on the floor. Hold a bar in a wide overhand grip and place it over the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1.  Press your heels to lift hips up until your body forms a straight line from your shoulders to your knees.
2. Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3. Lower back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2. ﻿﻿Squeeze your glutes when lifting your hips.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Sit with your upper back against the bench and feet flat on the floor. Lift your hips slightly off the floor and hold the barbell in an overhand grip on the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1. Push your hips upwards and raise the bar until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2. Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Slowly lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2. ﻿﻿Do not contact your glutes with the floor during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作:
Squat down with feet shoulder width apart and hold the bar with hands shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
動作要領
1. ﻿﻿Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2. ﻿﻿Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
3. ﻿﻿As you receive the bar, slightly bend your knees.
4. ﻿﻿Press the bar overhead until your arms are straight and then stand up straight.
5. ﻿﻿Lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示
1. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2. ﻿﻿Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
3. ﻿﻿As you receive the bar, slightly bend your knees.
4. ﻿﻿Press the bar overhead until your arms are straight and then stand up straight.
5. ﻿﻿Lower the bar to the starting position and repeat
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作:
Squat down with feet shoulder width apart.
Hold the bar with hands shoulder width apart in an overhand grip in front of the middle of your shins.
動作要領:
1. Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
2. ﻿﻿As you receive the bar, lower your hips to a front squat position.
3. ﻿﻿Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
4. ﻿﻿Lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart on the floor. Hold the bar in front of your thighs with palms facing backward and arms extended.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and and shrug your shoulders as high as possible with straight arms.
2. ﻿﻿Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Lower the barbell to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Place your hands closer or wider to better exercise different muscles.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Squat down with feet shoulder width apart and hold the barbell with hands wider than shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Shrug your shoulders to lift the barbell with your arms straight.
2.  Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar while lifting the barbell overhead with palms facing forward.
3.  As you lift the barbell, slightly bend your knees.
4.  Brace you core and drive through your feet to stand up straight.
5.  Lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Squat down with feet shoulder width apart and hold the barbell with hands shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the barbell up.
2.  Once the bar passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the bar with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
3.  As you receive the bar, slightly bend your knees.
4.  Straighten your knees and hips to stand up straight.
5.  Lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place a barbell behind across your shoulders. Hold the bar with your palms wide apart and facing forward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squat down by bending at the hips and knees until the thighs are parallel to the foor.
2. ﻿﻿Drive through heels, knees and hips to jump upward as high as possible.
3. ﻿﻿Land on the floor and bend your knees to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿To avoid joint injuries, keep your tiptoes be in the same direction with your knees.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the bar on the back of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.         2. Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2. Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3. Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4. Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.
5. Make a vertical movement with the barbell, do not tilt the arms.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders in a narrow overhand grip with elbows pointing slightly forward.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Do not rest the barbell on your shoulders.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 上斜板凳臥推 (窄距)  -槓鈴
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench and hold the barbell above your chest in a close overhand grip with arms bent.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2. Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell above your chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2. Inhale and slowly lower your bar to just above your chest and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Lie prone on the bench with toes planted on the floor. Hold the barbell in an overhand grip with arms hang straight down at your sides.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the barbell towards your rib cage.
2. Hold for a few seconds, inhale, lower the barbell to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head in line with your body.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell using a shoulder width overhand grip and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale to lower your arms behind your head until your arms are in line with your torso.
2. ﻿﻿Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale to pull the barbell in arc over your head until your arms are vertical to your body.
4. ﻿﻿Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell using a shoulder width overhand grip and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale to bend your elbows and lower your arms in an arc behind your head.
2. ﻿﻿Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale to pull the barbell in arc over your head until your arms are vertical to your body.
4. ﻿﻿Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1.  Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Extend your arms and hold a barbell with an underhand grip at the middle of your shins.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the barbell up towards your rib cage.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the barbell to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.  Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Extend your arms and hold a barbell with an overhand grip at the middle of your shins.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the barbell up towards your rib cage.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the barbell to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.  Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a barbell on the back of your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Take a big step back with one leg, crossing it behind the opposite leg.
2. Inhale and bend your knees and lower your hips until the front thigh is nearly parallel to the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale and push up through your heels to straighten your front leg and return the foot behind to the starting position.
4. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your torso upright and your hips and shoulders as square as possible.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Position the barbell across your front deltoids and hold it with your arms crossed horizontally.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4. ﻿﻿Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Place the bar in front of your chest with arms crossed. Brace your trunk and stand up tall.
動作要領:
1. Start walking and hold the bar steadily.
2. Drop your bar slowly at the end of your track.
3. Repeat for reps.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not hold the bar in your hands.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, increase the distance of walk gradually.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and hold the barbell in front of your thighs in an overhand grip with hands shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and lift the bar forward to the height of your shoulders.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep your arms straight and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at hips and hold the barbell off the floor outside of your thighs with an overhand grip. Slightly bend your knees.
動作要領:
1.  Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the barbell until standing up straight.
2. Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2. ﻿﻿Move the bar vertically.
3. ﻿﻿Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4. ﻿﻿Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5. ﻿﻿Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.
6. Do not let the bar touch the floor during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell in a wide underhand grip, resting it against your thighs.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and curl your forearms towards your chest.
2.  Squeeze your biceps when the bar touches your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3. Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep your elbows tucked to your sides.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Bend at the waist with your back and legs straight and hold a barbell in an underhand grip. Rest your elbows against your inner thighs.
動作要領:
1. Curl the bar up towards your shoulders.
2. Squeeze your biceps and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep your upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Set the barbell rested just below your knees.
Bend at hips and hold the barbell in an overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder width with arms extended.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten
your lats to lift the barbell until standing up straight.
2. ﻿﻿Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat
關鍵提示:
1. Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2. ﻿﻿Move the bar vertically.
3. ﻿﻿Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4. ﻿﻿Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5. ﻿﻿Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and grip a barbell on your shoulders in an overhand grip with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
動作要領:
1. Bend your knees slightly into a half-squat position.
2. ﻿﻿Press up through your heels and jump slightly to stand up. Drive the bar directly above your head until your arms are straight.
3. ﻿﻿Lower the bar down to your shoulders and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place the barbell in the front across your shoulders and grip it with palms facing upward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Descend your body to a squat position.
2. ﻿﻿Drive through your heels and hips to stand up. Drive the bar directly above your head until your arms are straight.
3. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿To avoid injuries, hold the bar firmly as you stand up and push it.
3. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Stretch your arms and hold a barbell with a shoulder width underhand grip at the top of your thighs.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Push the elbows backwards and raise the bar up towards your chest.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Move the bar vertically.
2. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell positioned behind your hips with hands shoulder width apart and palms facing backward.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2.Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3. Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let the bar touch the floor during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Bend your knees slightly and lower your torso until horizontal. Hold the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your lats and shoulder blades to pull the bar vertically to your rib cage.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell overhead with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and arms fully extended.
動作要領:
1. Squat down slowly with the bar resting overhead until your thighs are horizontal.
2. Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Keep the bar moving vertically.
3. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell behind the back of your head in an overhand grip with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your upper arms still and in line with your body.
2. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
3. ﻿﻿Do not shrug your shoulders throughout the movement.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a barbell across your back with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing forward.
動作要領
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and take a big step forward with one leg and lower your body, until the knee behind almost down on the floor with the front knee bent.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position through the front heel.
3. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and take a big step forward with one leg and lower your body, until the knee behind almost down on the floor with the front knee bent.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position through the front heel.
3. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place the barbell across your shoulders and hold it with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Hinge forwards from your hips and slightly bend in your knees until your upper body is parallel to the floor. Feel the stretch in your lower back and hamstrings.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.  Keep your head, spine and neck in line throughout the movement.
2. Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作:
Sit on a bench and rest your forearms on the thighs with the wrists ahead of the knees.
Hold a barbell with an overhand grip and curl the wrists downwards.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Extend the curled wrists and raise the barbell until you feel a stretch in your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your thighs and forearms parallel to the floor.
2.Keep your elbows and wrists at the same height during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a barbell at hip level in an overhand grip with arms extended and tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and curl the barbell up to your shoulders bending at the elbows.
2. ﻿﻿Do not swing the dumbbell down.
3. ﻿﻿Inhale and lower the barbell back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep your wrists straight throughout the movement.
2. ﻿﻿Do not swing the bar down.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell on the back of your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
Inhale and take a big step backward with one leg and lower your body, until the working knee almost down on the floor with the opposite leg bent.
Exhale and return to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand and take a step forward with one foot.
Hold the barbell on the back of your shoulders with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and lower the behind knee almost down on the floor and bend the front knee until the thigh is parallel to the floor.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
3. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Hold a barbell with a slightly wider than shoulder overhand grip. Put the bar on your chest with your head retracted and feet shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1. Bend your knees slightly into a half-squat position.
2. Quickly split feet with one foot forward and drive the bar directly above your head until your arms are straight.
3.  Bring your feet together and hold the bar for a few seconds.
4. Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2. ﻿﻿Bend your knees when you split your feet.
3. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at the hips and knees to hold the barbell near your shins in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and bend your elbows to lift the bar until the upper arms are parallel to the floor.
2. Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top for a few seconds. Inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Move the bar vertically.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with your chest up. Hold the barbell in an underhand grip with hands shoulder width apart and elbows tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1.Curl the bar up until your upper arms touch your chest.
2.Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps.
3.Lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand in front of a bench. Hold a barbell on your back across the shoulders with palms wide apart and facing forward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Put one foot on the bench.
2. ﻿﻿Inhale and drive through the front heel and midfoot to bring the leg behind onto the bench and stand up straight with legs together.
3.Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not use the leg on the floor to assist the upward movement.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie on the floor with legs apart. Hold the barbell above your chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2. Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Sit with your back against the bench and feet flat on the floor. Lift your hips slightly off the floor and hold the barbell in an overhand grip on the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1.Push your hips upwards and lift one leg up with knees bent until the other thigh is parallel to the floor.     2. Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3. Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the barbell to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2. Do not contact your glutes with the floor during the exercise.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell in a shoulder width underhand grip with arms extended against the pad.
動作要領:
1. Exhale, squeeze your biceps and bend you elbows to bring the bar close to your shoulders.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.
2
Keep your back straight and upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a barbell across your shoulders with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and step one leg to the side and bend at the knee until the thigh is parallel with the floor.
2. ﻿﻿Keep the opposite leg in place and straight.
3. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿To avoid damage to knees, control your body movement while lowering.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell at the height of the chest in a close overhand grip with arms bent.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

1. Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.

1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌

2.Push through your heels and midfoot into the floor to the 3.starting position slowly and repeat.

2. Do not lock out your knees at the top.
3. Keep your eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
4.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
5. ﻿﻿Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Extend one leg behind you and place the top of your foot on a bench behind you. Hold a barbell on the back of your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and slowly bend yourself down by bending the working knee until the thigh on the same side is parallel to the floor.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and raise your body back up by pushing through your heel in a controlled manner.
3. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
4. ﻿﻿Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lean forward as you come down.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your knees while driving up.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作要領:
1.Inhale and lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
2.Exhale and raise your body back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:

2. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.

2
Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.

1 To increase difficulty, position weight plates on the ground.
2
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：腿後肌群
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart on the floor. Rest your hands on an object to support you and shift your weight to one leg.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your hamstrings to curl the other leg backwards and raise the heel toward your hips until the calf is parallel with the floor.
2
Return to the starting position and repeat.
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep a straight back and thighs parallel during the exercise

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and knees bent. Lean over slightly and push your hips backward. Extend your arms at your sides with palms facing backward.
動作要領:
1.Rotate at the shoulders as you bring hands up and backward as high as possible.
2 Return to the starting position and repeat.

動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your lats and bend your elbows to pull yourself toward the bar.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and arms extended at your sides.
動作要領:
