possible.
2.Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.To increase difficulty, position weight plates on the ground.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell across your
stomach using one hand in a neutral grip with the arm 90 degrees bent.
動作要領:
1.Rotate the forearm outward laterally until it is perpendicular to your side.
2.Return to the starting position slowly and switch to the other side
and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep the upper arm perpendicular to the floor throughout the movement.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at the waist with your back and legs straight. Hold a dumbbell in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the
dumbbell until standing up straight.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Move the dumbbell vertically.
2.Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the
movement.
3.Keep your legs straight but do not lock your knees.
4.Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5.Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing forward and arms extended by your sides.
動作要領:
1.Pull your hands up in front of your body in a semi-circle motion until your hands meet above your head.
2.Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3.Slowly return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Squat down with your feet shoulder width apart and holda dumbbell in each hand in an overhand grip next to your shins with arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats. Exhale and lift the
dumbbells until standing up straight.
2.Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the
starting position.
2.Move the dumbbells vertically.
3.Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the
movement.
4.Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5.Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with your elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift dumbbells vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.DO not lock out your elbows af fhe fop.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold one dumbbell with both hands. Twist your torso and bring the dumbbel up above and behind your head.
動作要領:
1.Pull the dumbbell diagonally downward across your body to hips
height by rotating torso, lowering arms, and bending knees.
2.Return to the starting position and switch to the other side and
repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your knees when standing up.
2.Keep your arms straight and shoulders locked in place throughout the movement.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作:
Sit on the bench with feet together on the floor. Bend at your hips to
hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing backwards and arms
stretched.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your shoulder blades and bend the elbows to bring the
dumbbells upwards to your chest.
2.Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Move the dumbbells vertically.
2.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Sit on the floor with your legs extended in front and hold a dumbbell with your ankles. Lean backward with hands at the sides of your hips to stabilize your body.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your abs and bend your knees to bring your torso and legs
close to each other as much as possible.
2.Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your legs touch the floor throughout the movement.
2.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Lie on a bench and put your planted feet on the ground. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep yur upper arms still during the exercise.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell in each hand
in an overhand grip at shoulder width in front of your hips with arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Raise your elbows up and out to the sides until the dumbbells are at
your chin level.
2.Contract your shoulders and hold for a few seconds.
3.Lower the dumbbells to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your hands moving vertically.
2.Keep your elbows higher than your forearms during the exercise.
3.Keep the dumbbells close to your body.
4.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell in one hand in a neutral grip and place your free hand behind your head.
動作要領:
1.Bend at your waist and squeeze obliques to the opposite side as far
as possible.
2.Hold for a few seconds, return to the starting position and repeat.
3.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head up throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作:
Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor slightly apart.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a narrow grip above your chest.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your abs to sit up and press the dumbbells
overhead until arms are fuly stretched.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作:
Sit on the bench and position you toes slightly apart ona weight plate.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand on your thighs and push your heels down.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and slowly raise your heels up as high as possible.
2.Inhale, lower heels to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head, spine and neck in line and body balanced during the exercise.
2.Keep pressing the dumbbells against your knees during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Take a wide stance with toes pointed outward. Hold a dumbbell in both
hands in front of your body with arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2.Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3.Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2.Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3.Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4.Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作:
Sit on a bench and rest yOur forearms on the thighs with the wrists ahead
of the knees. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and curl your wrists up.
Pause for a few seconds at the top position.
2.Inhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your thighs and forearms parallel to the floor.
2.Keep your elbows and wrists at the same height during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet secured under the footpads. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward on each side of your chest.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the dumbbells up to extend
your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell above your thighs in each hand with palms facing up.
動作要領:
1.Rotate dumbbells round your shoulders in a semi-circle motion.
2.Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作:
Lie ftat on the floor with your arms fully extended overhead holding a
dumbbell together and legs extended apart in front.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and raise your arms and legs simultaneously to meet at the
top.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your legs touch the ground when lowering them.
2.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip with arms hang straight down at your sides.
動作要領:
1.Curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders with palms up.
2.Squeeze your biceps and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3.Lower the dumbbells to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep yOur upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet secured under the footpads. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms up and extend your arms to the sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and pull the dumbbells up in an arc motion in front of your
chest.
2.Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3.Inhale, return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not use your biceps at the top position.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart on the ftoor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip at your sides with arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and and shrug your shoulders as high as possible with straight arms.
2.Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3.Inhale and slowly lower the dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand beside your body. Place the toes and
the balls of your feet shoulder width apart onto a platform.
動作要領:
1.Elevate your heels slowly as high as possible.
20Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head, spine and neck in line.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand by your sides with arms extended. Squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
動作要領:
1.Drive through heels, knees and hips to jump upward as high as
possible.
2.Land on the floor and bend your knees to the starting position and
repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.To avoidjoint injuries, keep your tiptoes be in the same direction with your knees.
2.Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie with knees bent and feet together on the floor. Hold a dumbbell with both hands and place it over the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1.Press your heels to lift hips up until your body forms a straight line
from your shoulders to your knees.
2.Hold fora few seconds at the top position.
3.Lower back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2.Squeeze your glutes when lifting your hips.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作:
Bend at your waist and knees with feet shoulder width apart and torso
hearly horizontal. Hold the dumbbell with both hands between your legs.
動作要領:
1.Contract your glutes and thrust your hips forward to swing the
dumbbell up to your chest level.
2.Swing the dumbbell back down to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Rely on your glutes and quads to swing the kettlebell up instead of
your arms or back.
2.Keep the speed and height controlled and do not swing too fast or drop too low.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip at your sides with arms straight down.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2.Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3.Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2.Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3.Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4.Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.
5.Make a vertical movement with the dumbbells, do not tilt the arms.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms up and extend your arms to the sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and pull the dumbbells up in an arc motion in front of your
chest.
2.Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3.Inhale, return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not Use your biceps at the top position.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: Lie your upper back on a bench with your legs bent and feet planted on the floor. Hold the dumbbell using both hands and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1.Inhale to lower your arms behind your head until your arms are in line with your torso.
2.Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
3.Exhale to pull the dumbbell in arc over your head until your arms are
vertical to your body.
4.Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Lie prone on the bench with toes planted on the ffoor. Holda dumbbell in each hand in an overhand grip with arms hang straight down at your sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the dumbbells towards your rib cage.
2.Hold fora few seconds, inhale, lower the dumbbells to the starting
position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head in line with your body.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend over to hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing each other and arms extended downward.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together to raise your arms.
2.Hold fora few seconds when your arms are parallel to your shoulders.
3.Inhale and lower your arms to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your elbows and knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with your elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift dumbbells vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward on each side of your chest.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the dumbbells up to extend
your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作:
Place one foot on the floor with the opposite hand and leg on the bench.
Bend over to hold a dumbbell in a neutral grip. Bend the arm and tuck
the elbow to your torso.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and extend your elbow to press your hand backwards until
your arm is straight.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbow at the top.
2.Keep the working upper arm still and close to your side.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand vwifh teet shoulder widtfh apart and hold a dumbbell in eachhand in an overhand grip in front of your thighs.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and lift the dumbbells forward to the height of your shoulders.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your arms straight and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with legs split apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip. Have your arms fully extended next to your thighs and parallel to the floor.
動作要領:
1.Lie on a bench with legs split apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip. 
2.Have your arms fully extended next to your thighs and parallel to the floor.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作:
Stand and hold a dumbbell in each hand by your sides in a neutral grip
and arms extended.
動作要領:
1.Take short and quick steps forward fora set distance holding the dumbbells.
2.Lower the dumbbells down to the ftoor, take a short break and
repeat on the way back.
關鍵提示:
1.To add difficulty, use heavy dumbbells.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the dumbbells up toward your rib cage.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the dumbbells to the
starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with a neutral grip.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the dumbbells up toward your rib cage.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the dumbbells to the
starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell in each hand ina neutral grip at chin height with arms bent at your sides.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2.Hold fora few seconds to feel the contraction.
3.Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2.Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3.Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4.Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at hips and hold dumbbells off the floor outside of your thighs with an overhand grip. Slightly bend your knees.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the
dumbbells until standing up straight.
2.Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the
starting position.
2.Move the dumbbells vertically.
3.Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the
movement.
4.Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5.Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.
6.Do not let dumbbells touch the floor during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand by your sides.
動作要領:
1.Take a big step back with one leg, crossing it behind the opposite leg.
2.Inhale and bend your knees and lower your hips until the front thigh is nearly parallel to the floor.
3.Exhale and push up through your heels to straighten your front leg
and return the foot behind to the starting position.
4.Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2.Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3.Keep your torso upright and your hips and shoulders as square as
possible.

重點部位: 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell with one handand palms facing backward. Bend the arm at 90 degrees at shoulderlevel.
動作要領: 1.Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell with one hand and palms facing backward. 2.Bend the arm at 90 degrees at shoulder level.
關鍵提示:
1.To keep the balance, put your free hand on your waist.
2.Do not tilt the working forearm to the side.
3.Keep your working upper arm parallel to the ftoor throughout the
movement.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Stretch your arms and hold a
dumbbell in each hand on both sides with an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1.Push the elbows backwards and move the dumbbells up towards
your chest.
2.Lower the dumbbell to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.
2.Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand tucked to your sides with palms facing each other.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze biceps on one side and curl the dumbbell up towards the
opposite shoulder.
2.Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3.Return to the starting position and complete alternating between
left and right.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell using both hands behind the back of your head with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2.Pause fora few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your upper arms still and in line with your body.
2.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
3.Do not shrug your shoulders throughout the movement.
4.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand by your sides with arms fully extended.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and take a big step forward with one leg and lower your body,
until the knee behind almost down on the floor with the front knee bent.
2.Exhale and return to the starting position through the front heel.
3.Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2.Do not let your back knee touch the ftoor.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作: Sit on a bench and rest your forearms on the thighs. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with an overhand grip and curl the wrists downwards.
動作要領:
1.Extend the curled wrists and raise the dumbbells until you feel a
stretch in your arms.
2.Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your thighs and forearms parallel to the floor.
2.Keep your elbows and wrists at the same height during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie flat on the floor and hold a dumbbell in each hand at the sides of your hips. Lift your shoulders, arms and legs slightly off the ground.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your abs and bend your knees to bring your torso and legs
close to each other as much as possible.
2.Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your legs and shoulders touch the ground.
2.Keep your arms parallel to the floor.
3.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Sit on the end of a bench with feet on the floor. Holda dumbbell in one
hand with the elbow against the inner thigh and the arm extended.
動作要領:
1.Curl the dumbbell up towards your shoulder.
2.Squeeze your biceps and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3.Lower the dumbbell to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Stabilize your body by supporting the torso with your free hand on the thigh.
2.Keep your upper arm still during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and hold a dumbbell in each hand by your sides.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and take a big step backward with one leg and lower your body, until the working knee almost down on the floor with the
opposite leg bent.
2.Exhale, return to the starting position and complete alternating
between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2.Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Holda dumbbell in each hand at hip level in an overhand grip with arms extended and tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and curl the dumbbells up to your shoulders bending at the
elbows.
2.Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps when the
dumbbells reach the shoulder level.
3.Inhale and lower the dumbbells back to the starting position and
repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your wrists straight throughout the movement.
2.Do not swing the dumbbell down.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in one hand using an underhand grip and put the elbow on your thigh on the same side.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and curl the dumbbell up to your shoulders.
2.Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps when the dumbbell
reaches the shoulder level.
3.Inhale and lower the dumbbell to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your wrists straight throughout the movement.
2.Do not swing the dumbbell down.
3.Keep your body stationary by using the free hand on the opposite
thigh to support you.
4.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Lie prone on the bench with toes planted on the floor. Holda dumbbell in each hand with palms facing each other and arms hanging straight down at your sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together to raise your arms.
2.Hold for a few seconds when your arms are parallel to your shoulders.
3.Inhale and lower your arms to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head in line with your body.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Clasp your hands in front of your chest.
動作要領:
Take a big step back with one leg, crossing it behind the opposite leg.
2
Inhale and bend your knees and lower your hips until the front thigh is nearly parallel to the floor.
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and push up through your heels to straighten your front leg and return the foot behind to the starting position.
2. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your torso upright and your hips and shoulders as square as possible.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作:
Lie on the floor or a mat with knees bent.
Place your hands behind your head with elbows wide.
動作要領:
Squeeze your abs and rotate your upper body to bring you knee to the opposite elbow.
2
Return to the starting position slowly and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your head in a natural position and do not strain or pull on your neck.
2
Lift your shoulder blades slightly off the floor.
3
Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作:
Lie flat on one side and bend at the knees.
Uplift your torso and thighs and support them with a stretched arm. Put the other hand on your waist.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Keep this position as long as you can.
2. ﻿﻿Relax and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not put the body weight on your shoulder.
4.Do not lock out your elbow during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and knees bent. Lean over slightly and push your hips backward. Have your arms hung straight with palms facing each other.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades to lift your arms up and outwards slightly in a Y form.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Open your chest and face front during the exercise.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Stand in front of a wall and a big step away from it. Put your hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart on the wall and push against it with extended arms.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and bend the elbows to press your upper body towards the wall.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and push back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with your legs close together and arms straight down at your sides.
動作要領:
Jump as you move your feet out to sides shoulder width apart and swing your arms overhead in an arc motion.
2
Jump back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not tilt your arms and legs forward or backward.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Kneel down with your hands directly under the shoulders and your knees under the hips.
動作要領:
1 Point one arm out straight in front and extend the opposite leg behind you.
Return to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not sag your chest or back during the exercise.
2
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作:
Lie prone on the floor with feet put together, hands very wide apart and arms extended.
Form a straight line from head to toe.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
Exhale and raise your body back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie flat on the floor and lift your legs onto the stability ball with knees shoulder width apart and bent at 90 degrees. Put your hands across the chest or behind your head.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your abs to raise your shoulders off the ground towards your knees.
Pause at the top for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not touch the ground with your head throughout the exercise.
2 Keep your legs firm and do not stretch them.
3.Keep your head in a natural position and do not strain or pull on your neck.
4 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie with your knees bent and legs together on the floor. Place your hands behind your head with elbows wide.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your abs to raise your shoulders off the ground towards your knees.
2
Pause at the top for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your head in a natural position and do not strain or pull on your neck.
Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: Kneel on the floor with feet and knees on the floor. Extend your arms in front of you and keep them close to your ears.
動作要領:
1
Inhale and extend the knees to push your body forward.
2
Bend the elbows to support your body.
3 Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作:
Lie prone on the floor with legs extended.
Support your body by toes and extended arms with palms shoulder width apart and directly under shoulders.
動作要領:
1 Bend one knee and move it towards the opposite elbow.
2
Return to the starting position and quickly repeat.
3 Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your shoulders down and do not put the body weight on your shoulders.
4. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie flat with your body straight and knees bent. Place your feet on the floor and your hands under your head.
動作要領:
Squeeze your abs and rotate your upper body to bring one knee to the opposite elbow while keeping the opposite foot on the floor.
2
Return to the starting position slowly and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Keep a soft bend in your knees. Bend your elbows and clench your fists in front of your face.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Extend one arm forward as fast as you can.
2. ﻿﻿Take the arm back to the starting position.
3. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Punch in line with your shoulder.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your wrists in line with your forearms.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Place a bench beside you and stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend a little at knees and hips. Swing your arms straight behind you.
動作要領:
Drive through heels, knees and hips to jump onto the bench from the side. Swing your arms forward and bent.
Land on the bench with knees bent as softly as possible.
1. ﻿﻿Jump back down with knees bent to the other side of the bench.
2. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. To avoid joint injuries, keep your knees bent and tiptoes be in the same direction with them.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. Ensure the bench is steady for security.
4.Lower the height of the bench if you land in a deep squat rather than a quarter squat.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
Run in place while kicking one heel up towards your glutes. Lift the opposite hand up towards your shoulder.
2
Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not swing your leg or arms out to side.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your elbows and knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your hips and shoulders square during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Clasp your hands in front of your chest.
動作要領:
Press your hands up and raise your arms overhead.
2 Lower your hands back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Control and stabilize your arms during the exercise.
2
Keep a braced core during the exercise

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet slightly apart and hold a door frame around upper abs height. Lower your body back until arms are extended and keep your body in a straight line.
動作要領:
Squeeze your lats and bend your elbows to pull yourself up towards the door.
2 Pause at the top for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
Run in place while lifting one knee towards your chest and the opposite hand towards your shoulder.
Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your elbows and knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie prone with your elbows bent at 90 degrees and directly under your shoulders, legs extended.
動作要領:
Push your body up with knees and forearms on the floor.
2 Lift the feet up high until your knees are bent at 90 degrees.
Keep this position as long as you can.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your shoulders down and do not put the body weight on your shoulders.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Begin on all fours with knees hip-width apart and hands under your shoulders.
動作要領:
1 Press one foot to the ceiling with bent knee.
Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Return to the starting position and repeat.
4
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your pelvis staying pointed toward the ground.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your torso steady with a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not lift your thigh over your back.
4. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, use ankle weights.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie prone on the floor with feet and knees on the floor. Extend your arms and hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
Exhale and raise your body back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Kneel down with legs together. Lower your body to the floor with both elbows and hands shoulder width apart. Lean forward and support yourself by your forearms.
動作要領:
Exhale and extend your elbows to push your body off the floor until arms are straight.
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and lower your body to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, either move your knees backward or lean forward.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart and hands on your waist to maintain the balance.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and take a big step forward with one leg and lower your body, until the knee behind almost down on the floor with the front knee bent.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position through the front heel.
3. ﻿﻿Complete alternating between left and right
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 反向引體向上(器械輔助)
重點部位: 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the bar with palms facing backward, hands shoulder width apart and arms close to your ears. Extend your arms and rest your calves on the pad.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and bend your elbows to raise your body up until your chin is aligned with the bar.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your back.
Inhale and lower your body back slowly to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, use ankle weights.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：背部
準備工作: Bend knees and lean slightly forward with feet shoulder width apart. Raise arms at your sides and bend the elbows at 90 degrees with palms facing down.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Rotate your forearms upward until forearms are vertical again.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not tilt forearms to sides.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your upper arms parallel to the floor throughout the movement.

重點部位: 背部：背部
準備工作: Hang onto the bar with palms facing backward, hands shoulder width apart and arms close to your ears. Extend your arms and bend your knees slightly.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Exhale and bend your elbows to raise your body up until your chin is aligned with the bar.
2. ﻿﻿Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your back.
Inhale and lower your body back slowly to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.
2. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, use ankle weights.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 腹部
準備工作:
Sit on the floor with legs extended together.
Place your hands behind you directly under your shoulders with your fingers pointing forward.
動作要領:
Press onto your palms and lift your hips and torso off the floor.
2
Squeeze your core and hold for as long as you can.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your shoulders down and do not put the body weight on your shoulders.
4. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作:
Lie on your back and elevate your legs with knees bent at 90 degrees and thighs vertical to the floor. Position your arms at your sides to stabilize your trunk.
.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your abs and roll back to bring your legs together towards your torso with hips off the ground.
2. ﻿﻿Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your knees bent at 90 degrees
throughout the movement.
2.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand and take a big step backward with one leg and lower your body, until the working knee almost down on the floor with the opposite leg bent.
動作要領:
Straighten your opposite leg and draw your working leg forward until its thigh is parallel to the floor or higher.
2
Return to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Place your arms by your sides.
動作要領:
Inhale and take a big step backward with one leg and lower your body, until the working knee almost down on the floor with the opposite leg bent.
Exhale and return to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand and take a step forward with one foot.
Keep your arms extended by your sides.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and lower the behind knee almost down on the floor and bend the front knee until the thigh is parallel to the floor.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the bar with your hands shoulder width apart in an underhand grip and arms extended. Lie under the rack with body off the ground in a line and supported by the heels.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your lats and bend your elbows to pull yourself up to the bar until your chest touches the bar.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the bar with your hands shoulder width apart in an overhand grip and arms extended. Lie under the rack with body off the ground in a line and supported by the heels.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your lats and bend your elbows to pull yourself up to the bar until your chest touches the bar.
2. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Place your one bent leg and both hands under your shoulders on the bench. Rest the other leg beside the bench.
動作要領:
1
Stretch and kick the free leg back until your thigh is parallel with the floor.
Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
1. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
2. ﻿﻿Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not let your leg touch the floor when lowering it.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your pelvis staying pointed toward the ground.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your torso steady with a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
4. ﻿﻿To add difficulty, use ankle weights.

重點部位: 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie face down on the bench and hold the bench with both hands for stability. Stretch your legs with your calves elevated.
動作要領:
1.Contract your glutes to lift one leg as high as possible.
2.Lower the leg and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. To add difficulty, use ankle weights.
2.Keep a tucked chin and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie prone on the floor with feet together, hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and arms extended. Form a straight line from head to toe.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
2
Exhale and raise your body. Rotate your upper body to one side and lift the arm to the ceiling.
3. ﻿﻿Pause until your arms form a straight line.
4. ﻿﻿Rotate back to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 胸部
準備工作: Lie prone on the floor with feet together, hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and arms extended. Form a straight line from head to toe.
動作要領:
1
Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
Exhale and raise your body back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not fully extend your arms.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Sit on the floor and lean slightly backward with knees bent and feet planted slightly apart. Clasp your hands over the chest.
動作要領:
1
Exhale and squeeze your obliques to twist your torso to one side.
2
Twist your torso back to the starting position.
3 Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not use hands or arms to assist the movement.
2. ﻿﻿Keep your legs stationary throughout the movement.
3. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Sit with feet on the floor. Hold your leg with the opposite hand. Rest the elbow of the working arm against the thigh.
動作要領:
1
Use your working forearm to lift the leg towards your shoulder.
2
Squeeze your biceps and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Lower your leg to the starting position and repeat.
4
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示: 1.Keep your upper arm still during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Stand closely to an object with feet together.
Hold it and extend your arms to lean back with the arms tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1.Bend your arm to stand up straight.
Lean back to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌

Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.

1 Do not use the leg on the floor to assist the upward movement.
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Lie down with knees bent and feet on the Hoor. Bend your elbows at 90 degrees out to your sides against the floor with hands in fists and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Squeeze your shoulder blades and push your elbows into the floor to lift your back off the ground.
2. ﻿﻿Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.

1 Keep your forearms still throughout the movement
2
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部

Squeeze your back to slowly raise your chest upwards with your palms still.
2 Lower your body back to the starting position slowly and repeat.

2
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Position your hands shoulder width apart behind you on the floor. Bend your knees and lift your hips up. Stretch your arms with fingers facing forward and elbows tight.
動作要領:

2. ﻿﻿Push yourself up to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep your shoulders down and away from your ears.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: 1.Lie flat on the floor with your hands behind your head, elbows wide and legs extended in front.

Return to the starting position slowly and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:

2
Lift your shoulder blades slightly off the floor.
3
Keep a braced core during the exercise.

2

3 Return to the starting position and repeat.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie face down with elbows under your shoulders and toes on the floor to support your torso. Lift your hips off the floor to form a straight line from head to feet.
動作要領:
1 Brace your core and glutes to lift one leg off the floor.
2
Hold for a few seconds and return to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not drop your hips too low or raise them too high.
Keep a straight head and back during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 背部：背部
準備工作: Lie on your stomach with legs slightly lifted together. Support on your elbows at your sides with arms bent.
動作要領:
1.Slowly extend your arms and lift your upper body off the ground.
Hold at the top position for a few seconds until your lower back muscles are contracted.
Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿You can do this exercise holding a towel.
2. ﻿﻿Fully stretch your core and back muscles during the exercise.
3. ﻿﻿Keep your head in a neutral position during the exercercis

重點部位: 背部：下背部
準備工作: 1.Lie face down on the floor with your legs extended together. Extend your arms in front and keep your body in a straight line.
動作要領:
1 Lift your upper body and legs off the ground simultaneously slowly.
2
Hold at the top position for a few seconds until your lower back muscles are contracted.
Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Fully stretch your core and back muscles during the exercise.
Keep your head in a neutral position during the exercise

3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie on your one side with knees bent at 90 degrees. Put your hand on the floor on your obliques and the other hand behind your head with the elbow wide.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your obliques to crunch your upper body diagonally towards your feet with shoulders off the ground.
2 Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3
Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not strain or pull on your neck.
2. ﻿﻿Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie on your one side with your hand on the floor extended straight in front of your chest to stabilize your trunk and the other hand behind your head.
動作要領:
1. Squeeze your obliques to lift your legs off the ground.
2. Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not strain or pull on your neck.
2. Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie flat on one side with legs extended and your forearm on the floor. Position your elbow directly under your shoulder. Rest the other hand on your waist.
動作要領:
1. Squeeze your obliques to raise your hips upward.
2. Lower your hips down to the starting position and repeat.
3. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. Do not put the body weight on your shoulder.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie flat on one side with legs extended and your forearm on the floor. Position your elbow directly under your shoulder. Keep the other arm straight by your side.
動作要領:
1. Squeeze your obliques to raise your hips upward.
2. Keep this position as long as you can.
3. Relax and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. Do not put the body weight on your shoulder.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and toes pointing outwards. Bring your hands together in front of your chest.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and step one leg to the side and bend at the knee until the thigh is parallel with the floor.
2. Keep the opposite leg in place and straight.
3. Exhale and return to the starting position.
4. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not let your knee go over your toes.
2. To avoid damage to knees, control your body movement while lowering.
3. Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and knees bent. Lean over slightly and push your hips backwards with arms extended down and palms facing backwards.
動作要領:
1. Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
2. Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2. Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部
準備工作: Lie prone on the machine with your thighs and heels against the pads. Keep your body in a straight line and cross your arms in front of your chest.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and lower your upper body as far as you can.
2. Exhale and lift your upper body to the preparation position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not jerk or bounce.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart and your arms by your sides. Push your hips backward, bend over and lower your body into a squat position.
動作要領:
1. Lower your torso to touch the floor with your palms and bounce your feet backward into a push-up position.
2. Bring knees to the chest and jump your feet forward to the starting position.
3. Stand and jump quickly into the air and reach arms over your head.
4. Land and bend knees to get into the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not lift your chest first and leave the hips on the ground when you bring knees to the chest.
2. Keep your body straight from head to toe when in a push-up position.
3. To add difficulty, you can do the exercise with weights.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie prone with your elbows directly under your shoulders, legs extended and toes on the floor.
動作要領:
1. Push your body up with toes and forearms on the floor.
2. Keep this position as long as you can.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your head, torso and thighs in a straight line.
2. Keep a braced core during the exercise.
3. Keep your shoulders down and do not put the body weight on your shoulders.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Place a bench in front of you and stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend a little at the knees. Swing your arms straight behind you.
動作要領:
1. Drive through heels, knees and hips to jump onto the bench.
2. Swing your arms forward and bent.
3. Land on the bench with knees bent as softly as possible.
4. Jump back down with knees bent to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. To avoid joint injuries, keep your knees bent and tiptoes be in the same direction with them.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3. Ensure the bench is steady for security.
4. Lower the height of the bench if you land in a deep squat rather than a quarter squat.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Place a bench behind you. Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Clasp your hands in front of your chest.
動作要領: 1.Squat down until your buttocks touch the bench.2.Push through your heels and midfoot into the floor to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not bounce on the bench to assist the movement.
2. Do not lock out your knees at the top.
3. Keep your eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
5. Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Place a bench behind you. Stand with your one foot lifted off the ground. Keep your arms straight and parallel to the floor in front of your body.
動作要領: 1.Bend the knee of the standing leg until your buttocks touch the bench.2.Push through the heel and midfoot into the floor to the starting position slowly and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. Do not bounce on the bench to assist the movement.
2. Do not lock out your knees at the top.
3. Keep your arms still and the opposite leg lifted.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
5. Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀
準備工作: Rest your feet on a bench and hands on the floor. Bend your hips and form a pike shape with your body. Stretch your arms and legs.
動作要領:
1. Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your head nearly touches the ground.
2. Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not fully extend your arms.
2. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 胸部
準備工作:
Put a bench behind your back and grip the edge next to your hips with your torso upright.
Stretch your arms with fingers facing forward and elbows tight.
動作要領:
1.Bend your elbows to lower yourself until your upper arms are parallel to the floor, keeping your body erect.
2. Pause for a few seconds and push yourself up to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1. Keep your torso upright and legs extended.
2. To increase difficulty, put your legs on another bench in front of you.
3. Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the bar with palms facing forward, hands shoulder width apart and arms close to your ears. Extend your arms and bend your knees slightly.
動作要領:
I.  Exhale and bend your elbows to raise your body up until your chin is aligned with the bar.
2.  Roll your chest forward over the bar and press your hands down until your arms are fully extended to stabilize yourself in a dip.
3.  Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your back.
4.  Inhale and lower your body back slowly to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.
2. Change your palms from facing forward into downward when press your hands down.
3. To add difficulty, use ankle weights.
4. Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Extend one leg behind you and place the top of your foot on a bench behind you. Extend your arms and place your hands by your sides.
動作要領:
1. ﻿﻿Inhale and slowly bend yourself down by bending the working knee until the thigh on the same side is parallel to the floor.
2. ﻿﻿Exhale and raise your body back up by pushing through your heel in a controlled manner.
3. ﻿﻿Return to the starting position and repeat.
4. ﻿﻿Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1. ﻿﻿Do not lean forward as you come down.
2. ﻿﻿Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
3. ﻿﻿Do not lock out your knees while driving up.
4. ﻿﻿Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：腿後肌群

Lie face down ona bench with arms crossed in front of you and hold a
dumbbell tightly with your feet.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your hamstrings to curl your legs up and raise your heels
toward your hips, keeping your thighs and hips on the bench.
2.Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3.Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1.Do not lock out your knees at the bottom.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand and takeastep forward with one foot. Hold one dumbbell in each hand with arms extended by your sides.

1.Inhale and lower the behind knee almost down on the floor and bend
the front knee until the thigh is parallel to the floor.
2.Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
3.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2.Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作:
Put one leg and one arm of the same side on the bench to support you.
Bend over to hold the dumbbell in the free hand with your arm extended.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and bend your elbow to lift the dumbbell to your side until the upper arm is parallel to the ftoor.
2.Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top for a few seconds. Inhale
and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Move the dumbbell vertically.
2.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Sit on the floor and lean slightly backward with your knees bent and feet secured under the pads. Hold a dumbbell with both hands over your chest.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your obliques to twist your torso to one side.
2.Twist your torso back to the starting position.
3.Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not Use hands or arms to assist the movement.
2.Keep your legs stationary throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: 1.Lie prone on the foor with legs extended. Hold two dumbbells with both hands shoulder width apart. Form a straight line from head to toe.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your chest clmost touches the floor.
2.Exhale and raise your body.
3.Squeeze your back and bend your elbow to lift one dumbbell up, then ower it and lift the other one.
4.Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not fully extend your arms.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3.Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：背部, 腹部
準備工作:
Lie prone on the floor with feet together and arms extended. Hold two
dumbbells with both hands shoulder width apart. Form a straight line
from head to toe.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your back and bend your elbow to lift one dumbbell up while pushing the other into the floor.
2.Pause for a few seconds and lower it, back to the starting position and repeat.
3. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not fully extend your arms.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3.Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作:
Place one foot on the floor with the opposite hand and leg on the bench.
Bend over to hold a dumbbell with your free hand and extend the arm.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your lats and bend the elbow to pull the dumbbell toward
your rib cage.
2.Lower the dumbbell slowly until your arm is fully extended again and
switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in an underhand grip with arms extended at your sides and elbows tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1.Curl the dumbbells up until your forearms touch your chest.
2.Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps.
3.Lower the dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in both hands in
front of your chest.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and step one leg to the side and bend at the knee until the
thigh is parallel with the floor.
2.Keep the opposite leg in place and straight.
3.Exhale and return to the starting position.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not let your knee go over your toes.
2.To avoid damage to knees, control your body movement while
lowering.
3.Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand with one foot slightly off the floor. Stretch your arms and hold a
dumbbell in each hand in an overhand grip in front of your thighs.
動作要領:
1.Lift the raised leg behind you and lower your torso and arms.
2.Pause until your torso and the lifted leg are parallel with the floor.
3.Return to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Move the dumbbells vertically.
2.Do not let the raised leg touch the fłoor.
3.Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the
movement.
4.Keep the still knee slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand in front of a bench. Hold one dumbbell in each hand with palms
facing each other and arms straight beside your body.
動作要領:
1.Put one foot on the bench.
2.Inhale and drive through the front heel and midfoot to bring the leg behind onto the bench and stand up straight with legs together.
3.Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
4.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not Use the leg on the floor to assist the upward movement.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in
front of your thighs with palms facing each other. Extend arms tucked to
your sides.
動作要領:
1.Squeeze your biceps to bend your elbows and curl the dumbbells up
to your chest.
2.Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
2.Keep your elbows still to your sides throughout the movement.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a
neutral grip next to your thighs.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides
until they are parallel to the ffoor.
2.Pause fora few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell using one hand in
an underhand grip with the arm extended against the pad.
動作要領:
1.Exhale, squeeze your biceps and bend your elbow to bring the
dumbbell close to your shoulder.
2.Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position
slowly and repeat.
3.Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.
2.Keep your back straight and upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip andextend your arms to the sides.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and pull the dumbbells up in an arc motion in front of your
chest.
2.Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3.Inhale, return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not use your biceps at the top position.
2.Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3.Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Place a bench behind you and standing with feet shoulder width apart.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a neutral grip with arms extended at
your sides.
動作要領:
1.Squat down until your buttocks touch the bench.
2.Push through your heels and midfoot into the floor to the starting
position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not bounce on the bench to assist the movement.
2.Do not lock out your knees at the top.
3.Keep your eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
4.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
5.Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作:
Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand in a
close neutral grip at the height of the chest with arms bent.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the dumbbells up to extend
your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower your dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作:
Lie on a bench with feet on the floor. Holda dumbbell in each hand with
elbows bent and palms facing forward on each side of your chest.
動作要領:
1.Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the dumbbells up to extend
your arms straight.
2.Inhale and slowly lower dumbbells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Extend one leg behind you and place the top of your foot on a benchc behind you. Hold a dumbbell in each hand.
動作要領:
1.Inhale and slowly bend yourself down by bending the working knee
until the thigh on the same side is parallel to the floor.
2.Exhale and raise your body back up by pushing through your heel in a Controlled manner.
3. Return to the starting position and repeat.
4. Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lean forward as you come down.
2.Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
3.Do not lock out your knees while driving up.
4.Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold a dumbbell in each hand with elbows bent at around 45 degrees at your sides and palms facing your body.
動作要領:
1.Rotate your hands until your palms are facing forward and squeeze your shoulders to press the dumbbells vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2. Pause for a few seconds, slowly lower your arms and rotate hands
back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1.Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2.Do not rest dumbbells on your shoulders.
3. Keepa straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on the bench under the machine with feet on the floor. Hold the bar over your chest in a shoulder width grip with arms bent and palms facing forward.
動作要領: 1 Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 板凳臥推 (寬距)-史密斯架
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on the bench under the machine with feet on the foor. Hold the barbell above your chest in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
動作要領: 1 Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.2Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand beside the bench in the machine. Hold the bar across your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.

關鍵提示: 1 Do not use the leg on the floor to assist the upward movement.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand in the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the bar in a shoulder width underhand grip with elbows tucked to your sides.

關鍵提示: 1 Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand in the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Slightly bend at the hips and knees.Hold the bar next to your thighs in an overhand grip.

關鍵提示: 1 Move the bar vertically.2 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand under the machine and take a step forward with one foot. Hold the bar on the back of your shoulders with palms facing forward.

關鍵提示: 1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet together on the platform.Hold the bar on the back of your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
動作要領: Stand with feet together on the platform.Hold the bar on the back of your shoulders in a wide grip with palms facing forward.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand in the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Place the bar across your shoulders and hold it with palms facing forward.
動作要領: 1 Hinge forwards from your hips and slightly bend in your knees until your upper body is parallel to the floor. Feel the stretch in your lower back and hamstrings.2Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep your head, spine and neck in line throughout the movement.2 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Position the bar across your front deltoids and hold it with your arms crossed horizontally.
動作要領: Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.  2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.  3Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand before the machine with your feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Hold the bar by both hands with an overhand grip.
動作要領: 1 Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the bar toward your rib cage.2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, lower the bar to the starting point slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 上斜板凳臥推-史密斯架
器材: 上斜板凳, 史密斯架
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on the bench under the machine with feet on the floor. Hold the the bar above your chest in a shoulder width grip with arms bent and palms facing forward.
動作要領: 1 Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.2Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand in the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing forward.
動作要領: 1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.2Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: Do not lock out your elbows at the top.2 Do not rest the bar on your shoulders.3 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.4 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand under the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the bar on the back of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing torward.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3 Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.
5 Make a vertical movement with the bar, do not tilt the arms.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand in the machine, facing forward. Hold the bar in front of your thighs in a close overhand grip with arms extended.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and and shrug your shoulders as high as possible with straight arms.
2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Inhale and lower to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Place your hands closer or wider to better exercise different muscles.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie under the machine with knees bent towards your chest. Position your midfoot against the bar with feet shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1 Press the bar up until your legs are almost fully extended.
2 Pause for a few seconds, then bend the knees to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your hips steady during the exercise.
2 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Sit with your back against the bench and feet fat on the floor. Lift your hips slightly off the floor and hold the barbell in an overhand grip on the crease of your hips.
動作要領:
1 Push your hips upwards and raise the bar until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2
Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
Slowly lower the bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1
Do not allow your knees fall inward or outward.
2 Do not contact your glutes with the floor during the exercise.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 踏板上站姿提踵-史密斯架
重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作:
Stand under the machine and hold the barbell on your shoulders with palms facing forward.
Place the toes and the balls of your feet shoulder width apart onto a platform.
動作要領:
1
Elevate your heels slowly as high as possible.
2
Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your head, spine and neck in line.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Lie under the machine with your legs straight hip-width apart and perpendicular to your body. Position your midfoot against the bar with knees slightly bent.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your abs to lift your hips off the floor as much as possible.
2 Pause at the top for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your arms extended on the floor to secure your upper trunk.
2 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 蛙式髖關節伸展-史密斯架
重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie your upper body on the bench and hold it with both hands for stability. Position the midfoot shoulder width apart under and against the bar with knees bent.
動作要領:
Exhale and squeeze your glutes to press the bar up.
2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3
Inhale and lower the bar to the starting
position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: Keep a tucked chin and straight back with braced core during the exercise.

動作名稱: 下斜板凳臥推-史密斯架
