重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on the bench under the machine with feet secured under the footpads. Hold the barbell over your chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the bar up to extend your arms straight.
2
Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Take a wide stance with toes pointed outward. Hold the barbell on the back of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend over to hold the bar in an overhand grip with hands shoulder width apart and arms extendea.
動作要領:
Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten
your lats to lift the bar until standing up straight.
2
Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2 Move the bar vertically.
3 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4 Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5 Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Sit on a bench with feet on the floor. Hold the barbell in front of your shoulders with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Do not rest the barbell on your shoulders.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand under the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the barbell in an overhand grip at shoulder width in front of your hips with arms extended.
動作要領:
1 Raise your elbows up and out to the sides until the bar is at your chin level.
2
Contract your shoulders and hold for a few seconds.
Lower the bar to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your elbows higher than your forearms during the exercise.
2 Keep the bar close to your body.
3 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at the waist with your back and legs straight.
Hold the bar in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the bar until standing up straight.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Move the bar vertically.
2 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
3 Keep your legs straight but do not lock your knees.
4 Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5 Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: Stand under the machine with feet hip width apart. Unlock the bar and hold it with hands shoulder width apart and arms fully extended.
動作要領:
1 Elevate your heels off the ground slowly and as high as possible.
2 Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your head, spine and neck in line.
2 To increase difficulty, position weight plates on the ground.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a kettlebell in each hand in a neutral grip next to your thighs.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold kettlebells in both hands in front of your chest.
動作要領:
Inhale and step one leg to the side and bend at the knee until the thigh is parallel with the floor.
2 Keep the opposite leg in place and straight.
3 Exhale and return to the starting position.
4
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not let your knee go over your toes.
2 To avoid damage to knees, control your body movement while lowering.
3 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the kettlebell with one hand in a neutral grip with arm extended. Position the opposite leg forward and bend the knee slightly to lean your torso forward.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your lats and bend the elbow to pull the kettlebell toward your rib cage.
2
Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand with one foot slightly off the floor.
Stretch your arms and hold a kettlebell in the opposite hand in an overhand grip at your side.
動作要領:
1 Lift the raised leg behind and lower your body and the arm holding kettlebell.
2 Pause until your torso and the lifted leg are parallel with the floor.
3 Return to the starting position and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Move the kettlebells vertically.
2 Do not let the raised leg touch the floor.
3 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4 Keep the still knee slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：背部, 腹部
準備工作: Lie prone on the floor with feet together and arms extended. Hold two kettlebells with both hands shoulder width apart. Form a straight line from head to toe.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your back and bend your elbow to lift one kettlebell up while pushing the other into the floor.
2
Pause for a few seconds and lower it, back to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not fully extend your arms.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3 Do not let your chest touch the floor.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: Lie flat with knees bent and feet planted on the floor. Hold the kettlebell with both hands in an overhand grip and press it over your chest with arms stretched.
動作要領:
1 Inhale to bend your elbows and lower your arms in an arc behind your head.
2
Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
Exhale to pull the kettlebell in arc over your head until your arms are vertical to your body.
4 Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Put one leg and one arm of the same side on the bench to support you. Bend over to hold the kettlebell from the floor in the free hand in an overhand grip with the arm extended.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and bend your elbow to lift the kettlebell to your side until the upper arm is parallel to the toor.
2
Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top for a few seconds. Inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Move the kettlebell vertically.
2 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

lnhale and take a big step backward with one leg and lower your body, until the working knee almost down on the floor with the opposite leg bent.
2
Exhale and return to the starting position and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部

動作要領:
1 Bend at your waist and squeeze obliques to the opposite side until touching your feet with the free hand.
2 Hold for a few seconds and brace your glutes.
3
Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep the arm holding the kettlebell steady and fully extended overhead.
Keep looking up at the kettlebell and a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a kettlebell in each hand by your sides.
動作要領:
Inhale and take a big step forward with one leg and lower your body, until the knee behind almost down on the floor with the front knee bent.
2
Exhale and return to the starting position through the front heel.
«Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and toes pointing outwards. Bend the elbows in front of you and hold two kettlebells beside your shoulders with a neutral grip.
動作要領:
1 Descend your body to a squat position.
2 Drive through your heels and hips to stand up. Drive the kettlebells directly above your head until your arms are straight.
Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Do not let your knees go over your toes when you squat.
2 Rotate the wrists as you pull the kettlebells towards your shoulders.
3 To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
4 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Stand and hold a kettlebell in each hand by your sides in a neutral grip and arms extended.
動作要領:
Take short and quick steps forward for a set distance holding the kettlebells.
Lower the kettlebells down to the floor, take a short break and repeat on the way back.
關鍵提示:
1 To add difficulty, use heavy kettlebells.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a kettlebell with both hands at shoulder height and arms bent at your sides.
動作要領:
Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a kettlebell using both hands in front of your chest.
動作要領:
1 Take a big step back with one leg, crossing it behind the opposite leg.
2
Inhale and bend your knees and lower your hips until the front thigh is nearly parallel to the Hoor.
3 Exhale and push up through your heels to straighten your front leg and return the foot behind to the starting position.
4 Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3 Keep your torso upright and your hips and shoulders as square as possible.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Hold a kettlebell in each hand with a neutral grip.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the kettlebells up toward your rib cage.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a kettlebell in each hand with elbows bent at around 45 degrees at your sides and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to press the kettlebells vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1  Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Bend at your waist and knees with feet shoulder width apart and torso nearly horizontal. Hold the kettlebell with both hands between your legs.
動作要領:
Contract your glutes and thrust your hips forward to swing the kettlebell up to your chest level.
2
Swing the kettlebell back down to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Rely on your glutes and quads to swing the kettlebell up instead of your arms or back.
2 Keep the speed and height controlled and do not swing too fast or drop too low.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise

重點部位: 全身
準備工作: Lie with your left arm stretched on the floor, 45 degrees with your body and your right arm holding a kettlebell, stretched perpendicular to the floor. Bend your right leg and have your right foot flat on the floor.
動作要領:
1 Press your left elbow and drive through your right foot to roll up onto your left forearm.
2 Press away from the floor with your left hand as you lift your forearm and lockout your elbow.
3 Raise your butt off the floor and have your left knee land where you sat.
4 Rotate your left lower leg to align your left leg in the same direction as your right leg.
5 Drive through your right foot to stand up.
• Return to the starting position and repeat.
7 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
Keep the wrist and elbow of the still arm straight throughout the movement.
2 Keep your shoulder packed and stare at the kettlebell during the exercise.

重點部位: 全身
準備工作:
Squat down with feet shoulder width apart.
Hold one kettlebell in each hand next to your feet with hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Drive your hips up and straighten your legs to pull the kettlebells up.
2 Once the kettlebells passes your mid-thigh, jump slightly and drop your body under the kettlebells with your elbows facing forward and palms facing up.
3 As you receive the kettlebells, slightly bend your knees.
4 Press the kettlebells overhead until your arms are straight and then stand up straight.
5 Lower the kettlebells to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2 Keep your knees and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Take a wide stance with toes pointed outward. Bend your elbows to hold a kettlebell in front of your chest.
動作要領:
Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Lie on your back with knees bent and feet flat on the floor slightly apart. Hold a kettlebell with both hands above your hips.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your abs to sit up and press the kettlebell overhead until arms are fully stretched.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Squat down with feet shoulder width apart.
Hold a kettlebell with both hands between your shins with arms extended.
動作要領:
1
Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten
your lats to lift the kettlebell until standing up straight.
2
Rotate your shoulders back until feeling slightly stretched.
3 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2 Move the kettlebell vertically.
3 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
4 Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5 Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at the waist with arms stretched and legs straight. Hold a kettlebell with both hands between your shins with arms extended.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats to lift the kettlebell until standing up straight.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Move the kettlebell vertically.
2 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
3 Keep your legs straight but do not lock your knees.
4 Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
5 Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Sit on the machine with your back flat and feet on the floor. Hold the handles with your elbows bent and arms against the pads.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Sit on the machine with feet on the floor. Hold the handles in an underhand grip with arms extended against the pad.
動作要領:
1 Exhale, squeeze your biceps and bend you elbows to bring the handles close to your shoulders.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows during the exercise.
2 Keep your back straight and upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Sit on the machine with feet on the floor. Hold the handles at your sides in an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Curl one handle up until your forearm touches your chest.
2 Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps.
3 Lower the handle to the starting position and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：腿後肌群
準備工作: Lie face down on the machine. Secure your ankles under the lever pad and hands on the handles.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your hamstrings to curl your legs up and raise your heels toward your hips, keeping your thighs and hips on the bench.
2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not lock out your knees at the bottom.

動作名稱: 反手引體向上（器械輔助）
重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the bar with palms facing backward, hands shoulder width apart and arms close to your ears. Extend your arms and rest your calves on the pad.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and bend your elbows to raise your
body up until your chin is aligned with the bar.
2 Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your back.
Inhale and lower your body back slowly to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.
2 To add difficulty, use ankle weights.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Begin on all fours with knees hip-width apart and hands under your shoulders. Place one foot under the roller and keep the opposite knee bent.
動作要領:
1
Press the roller to the ceiling with your bent knee.
2 Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Return to the starting position and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1  Keep your pelvis staying pointed toward the ground.
2 Keep your torso steady with a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3 Do not lift your thigh over your back.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Kneel down on the machine with your chest and thighs against the pads. Hold the handles in a neutral grip.
動作要領:
1 Rotate your lower body to one side while keeping your upper body still.
2 Feel the contraction in your obliques and return to the starting position slowly.
3 Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your upper body still throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and tightened glutes throughout the movement.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie on the machine with shoulders against the pads and feet together. Hold the handles in a neutral grip.
動作要領:
Inhale and squat down until your knees bent at 90 degrees.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3 Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not let the bar touch the floor during the exercise.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腿部：內收肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand on the machine with one leg straight on the roller. Hold the handles on your sides.
動作要領:
Move your working leg toward and across the standing leg.
2 Slowly return to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
Do not use momentum to lift or swing your leg.
2 Keep your upper body straight and stationary during the exercise.
3
Keep your hips and shoulders squared front.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Lie your upper body on the machine. Place your ankles between the rollers. Hold the handles for stability.
動作要領:

2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Inhale and lower your legs to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Keep a tucked chin and straight back with braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌

2
Lower the roller to the starting position and repeat.

關鍵提示:
1 Do not swing your leg back to create momentum to perform the motion.
2 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌

關鍵提示:

2 Keep your elbows still and close to your sides throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 胸部
準備工作: Keep your torso upright with your feet crossed below the body. Hold a bar in each hand with your arms straight and elbows tight.

2 Pause for a few seconds and push yourself up to the starting position slowly and repeat.

1 Keep your legs stationary throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 胸部

準備工作: Sit on the machine with feet on the floor. Hold the lever behind your head using both hands with elbows bent and against the pads.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and pull the lever forward in front of you.
Inhale and return to the starting position.
Stretch out your chest and pause for a few seconds.
4 Repeat slowly.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Sit on the machine with your feet on the platform. Hold the handles with palms facing forward.
動作要領:
Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the handles up to extend your arms straight.
Inhale and slowly lower your bar to the starting position and repeat.

1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand on the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the handles with shoulders against the pads.
動作要領:
Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3
Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：股四頭肌

準備工作: Stand with your back facing the machine and feet shoulder width apart. Hold a handle in each hand.

Exhale and shrug your shoulders as high as possible with straight arms.
2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3
Inhale and lower to the starting position and repeat.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌

Sit on the machine with your back against the pad and feet secured under the footpads.
Hold the handles for stability.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and extend your knees until your legs are parallel to the floor.

degrees when lowering.

重點部位: 腿部：外展肌, 腿部：臀肌

動作要領:

2 Pause for a few seconds at the top position.

4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not use momentum to lift or swing your leg.
2 Keep your upper body straight and stationary during the exercise.

2
Bring the knees back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:

2 Do not lock out your knees at the top.

degrees when lowering.

準備工作: Keep your torso upright with your feet crossed below the body. Hold a bar in each hand with your arms straight and elbows slightly flared.

• Bend your elbows and tilt forward to lower yourself until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
2 Pause for a few seconds and push yourself up to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep your legs stationary throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Keep your torso upright and knees on the pads with legs together. Hold a bar in each hand with your arms straight and elbows slightly flared.
動作要領:
Bend your elbows and tilt forward to lower yourself until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
2 Pause for a few seconds and push yourself up to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep your legs stationary throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.

重點部位: 肩膀

1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to lift the bar vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部

2
Hold for a few seconds when the handles almost touch your abs.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部

2 Hold for a few seconds when the handles almost touch your abs.

1 To add difficulty, add weights gradually.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: Sit on the machine and position your toes shoulder width apart at the bottom of the platform. Hold handles on your sides.

Exhale and press on the platform to extend your ankles as far as possible.
Inhale, extend your calves to lower to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:

2 Keep your legs and torso static during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：腿後肌群

動作要領:
1
Squeeze your hamstrings to curl your legs and pull the pads back until your legs bend at a 90-degree angle.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部

2
Inhale and return to the starting position

1 Press the platform away from you through your heels until your legs are almost fully extended.
2
Bring the knees back to the starting position and repeat.

Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌

Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

1 Rotate your lower body to one side while keeping your upper body still.

3
Complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:

Inhale and slowly lower your handles to the

關鍵提示:

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Lie on a bench with your chest lined up with the machine pulleys. Hold a handle in each hand with palms up and extend your arms to the sides.

2
Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3
Inhale, return to the starting position and repeat.

1 Do not use your biceps at the top position.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作:
Stand in the machine with feet slightly apart.
Hold one handle with your opposite hand and vice versa.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.

1 Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand beside the machine with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the handle at shoulder level.

Inhale and step one leg to the side and bend at the knee until the thigh is parallel with the floor.
2 Keep the opposite leg in place and straight.

4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.

2 To avoid damage to knees, control your body movement while lowering.

2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.

2 Keep your back straight and upper arms still during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the rope attachment in front of your thighs with palms facing each other. Extend arms tucked to your sides.

1 Squeeze your biceps to bend your elbows and curl the rope up to the height of your chest.
2 Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.

2 Keep your elbows still to your sides throughout the movement.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hold the handle with one hand in a neutral grip with arm extended. Position the opposite leg forward and bend the knee slightly to lean your torso forward.

2 Pause at the top for a few seconds, return to the starting position and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.

1 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀

1 Do not shrug your shoulder when raising the arm up.

3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

準備工作: Sit on the bench facing the machine. Hold the handle with one hand in an overhand grip and the arm stretched upward.

Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
3 Complete alternating between left and right.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand and hold the bar connected to the low pulley in an underhand grip and shoulder width apart with elbows tucked to your sides.

1 Do not bounce back.

Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌

Inhale and slowly raise yourself back to the preparation position and repeat.

nhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.

Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat

Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercis

3 Lower the bar to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your hands moving vertically.
2 Keep your elbows higher than your forearms during the exercise.
3 Keep the bar close to your body.
4 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Stand with one foot in front of the other. Hold the handles with palms facing forward and extend
動作要領:
1 Pull your hands up in front of your body in an arc motion until your hands meet above your head.
2
Squeeze your chest and hold for a few seconds.
3
Slowly return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 背部：背部, 腰部, 腹部
準備工作: 仰臥屈膝；一手胸口、一手腹部；肩頸放鬆
動作要領: 鼻吸：腹部溫和隆起、腰背有撐開感；口吐：腹部回落，吐氣略長於吸氣
關鍵提示: 胸口少動、肩不聳；吐氣慢長、不憋氣

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：上背部, 頸部
準備工作: 仰臥（可墊薄毛巾）；眼看天花板
動作要領: 下巴水平往後滑做「雙下巴」，後腦勺延伸；維持 3–5 秒
關鍵提示: 下巴往後不點頭；力度輕、呼吸不中斷

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部, 腰部, 腹部
準備工作: 四足跪：手在肩下、膝在髖下
動作要領: 吐氣拱背（貓）；吸氣胸口打開、背下沉（牛）；動作連貫
關鍵提示: 用呼吸帶動；肩不聳、腰以舒適角度

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部, 胸部, 腰部
準備工作: 側躺髖膝約 90°；膝可夾枕固定
動作要領: 固定下半身，上方手像翻書打開，胸口旋轉、視線跟手；回程控制
關鍵提示: 膝蓋固定；用胸口帶動，不甩手；吐氣打開更順

動作名稱: 胸椎伸展（跪姿手肘撐地、胸口向地再回）
重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部, 胸部, 腰部
準備工作: 跪姿前臂撐地；腹部輕收、下巴微收
動作要領: 吐氣胸口往地沉、上背延伸；吸氣回起始；骨盆不前移
關鍵提示: 胸口往地沉、不是屁股往後坐；腰不夾痛

動作名稱: 四足跪肩胛前推/後收（Scapular push-up）
重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部, 胸部
準備工作: 四足跪；手掌均勻受力；手肘打直不鎖死
動作要領: 吸氣肩胛後收背微下沉；吐氣肩胛前推把地推遠；軀幹穩定
關鍵提示: 手肘不彎、只動肩胛；不要聳肩；腹部微收防塌腰

動作名稱: 牆上滑手（Wall slide，保持肋骨不外翻）
重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部, 胸部, 腹部
準備工作: 背靠牆、腳離牆 10–20cm；下背輕貼牆；手肘 90° 前臂貼牆
動作要領: 先吐氣收肋骨＋腹部輕收；手臂沿牆上滑到可控高度再回
關鍵提示: 下背不拱、肋骨不翹；肩不聳、脖子放鬆

動作名稱: 俯臥 Y / T（小幅度、肩胛下沉外旋）
重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：背部
準備工作: 俯臥額頭墊毛巾；腹部輕收
動作要領: 拇指朝上（上臂外旋），肩胛下沉；Y（約120°）/T（90°）小幅抬起停 1–2 秒再放
關鍵提示: 小幅度以控制為主；先伸長再抬；腰不拱、肩離耳

動作名稱: 桌緣/牆面推牆（Incline push-up）＋頂端「加一點肩胛前推」
重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱三頭肌, 手臂：肱二頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: 牆面較易、桌緣較難；身體一條線；腹部輕收
動作要領: 下放吸氣、肘約 30–45°；推起吐氣回頂端；頂端再把牆/桌推遠 1 秒（肩胛前推）
關鍵提示: 身體像板；吐氣推起、頂端再推遠；肩不聳、頸放鬆

動作名稱: 仰臥腹式呼吸＋吐氣時肋骨回收
重點部位: 背部：背部, 胸部, 腰部, 腹部
準備工作: 仰臥屈膝；一手下肋、一手腹部
動作要領: 吸氣下肋向外擴；吐氣下肋往內下合回、腹部輕收，腰中立
關鍵提示: 先吐氣收肋骨再吸；腰不拱、肩頸放鬆

重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: 仰臥屈膝（亦可坐/站）；摸骨盆前側作定位
動作要領: 吐氣後傾讓下背貼近；吸氣前傾讓腰出自然弧度；在兩端之間找最省力中立位
關鍵提示: 用骨盆滾動不抬臀；中立＝介於貼平與拱起之間

重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 腿部：臀肌, 髖關節
準備工作: 坐姿前後腳膝皆約 90°；坐骨平均著地
動作要領: 吐氣把雙膝翻到另一側換腳；以髖旋轉為主、腰不大扭；換邊停 1–2 秒
關鍵提示: 先坐直再換邊；骨盆少歪；需要可用手撐地輔助

動作名稱: 跪姿髖屈肌伸展（骨盆保持中立）
重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 腿部：臀肌, 髖關節
準備工作: 半跪姿；先收肋骨＋腹部輕收、臀部輕夾
動作要領: 維持骨盆中立下整體微前移，感受後側髖前拉伸；可加同側手上舉/側彎
關鍵提示: 維持骨盆中立下整體微前移，感受後側髖前拉伸；可加同側手上舉/側彎

動作名稱: 死蟲式Dead bug（對側手腳伸）
重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 髖關節
準備工作: 仰臥桌面腿 90/90；先吐氣收肋骨、腰穩
動作要領: 吐氣伸對側手＋腳到可控距離；骨盆不晃、肋骨不外翻；吸氣回來交替
關鍵提示: 腰穩定優先；伸到控制得住即可；慢、穩、呼吸不中斷

重點部位: 背部：背部, 腰部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: 站姿膝微彎；可用棍三點貼（後腦/上背/尾椎）
動作要領: 骨盆往後送、軀幹前傾但脊椎中立；膝只微彎；吐氣用臀帶回站直
關鍵提示: 屁股往後不是往下蹲；肋骨收住不拱腰；重量在腳中後段

動作名稱: 短足（Short-foot，足弓輕收、腳趾放鬆）
重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 足部：腳踝
準備工作: 赤腳坐/站；腳掌三點貼地；腳趾放鬆
動作要領: 在腳趾不抓地前提下讓前腳掌「往後收」，足弓微抬；維持 3–5 秒
關鍵提示: 腳趾放鬆；力道小、抽筋代表太用力；三點著地不塌弓

動作名稱: 腳趾瑜伽（大腳趾抬/其餘抬）
重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 足部：腳踝
準備工作: 赤腳坐/站；三點貼地；膝對第二趾
動作要領: A 大趾抬：四趾貼地不翹；B 四趾抬：大趾球貼地不抬；各停 2–3 秒交替
關鍵提示: 不靠甩、動作慢；三點不離地；抽筋就縮小幅度

動作名稱: 踝背屈動態（膝蓋往腳趾方向、腳跟不離地）
重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 足部：腳踝
準備工作: 弓箭步或面牆；腳尖朝前；可設目標距離
動作要領: 膝沿第二趾方向前推靠近目標，足弓穩、腳跟不離地；停 1 秒回來
關鍵提示: 膝不內夾；腳跟黏地；終點停 1 秒、控制回程

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: 站姿扶牆；膝微彎 20–30°；三點著地
動作要領: 膝角度固定，腳跟抬到最高停 1 秒，慢慢下降
關鍵提示: 膝角度固定；下降慢、不重摔；踝維持正中

重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌
準備工作: 背靠牆；腳跟離牆 20–40cm；腳跟固定貼地
動作要領: 以前腳掌往上抬到最高停 1 秒，控制放下
關鍵提示: 腳跟不移位；抬前腳掌非整腳滑動；放下要控制

重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: 背貼牆；雙腳離牆 30–60cm；腳尖朝前
動作要領: 下滑到半蹲角度（約 45–60°或無痛範圍），膝對第二趾；腹部輕收、骨盆中立
關鍵提示: 膝不內夾；腳跟不抬；腰不拱、肋骨收住

重點部位: 腰部, 腹部, 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: 穩固椅；坐椅前 1/3；腳與髖同寬
動作要領: 髖鉸鏈前傾移重心至腳中段；吐氣站起；吸氣控制坐下輕碰再起
關鍵提示: 先前傾再站；膝對第二趾；坐下要慢、不摔坐

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作: Secure a band around a bench and lie on it with feet on the floor. Hold the handles at the height of the chest with elbows bent at 90 degrees and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your chest to push the handles up to extend your arms straight.
2
Inhale and slowly lower your handles to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Secure the band where your head rests.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Attach the band to a sturdy object and bend forward at your waist to hold both ends of the band with arms extended.
動作要領:
1 Extend your waist to stand up straight.
2 Lower your upper body to the preparation position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not jerk or bounce.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand on the middle of the band with feet together and hold a handle of the band in each hand with a neutral grip next to your thighs.
動作要領:
Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to raise your arms to the sides until they are parallel to the floor.2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not shrug your shoulders when raising arms up.
2 Keep your elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold a handle in each hand in front of your thighs with palms facing each other. Extend arms tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your biceps to bend your elbows and curl the band up to the height of your chest.
2 Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
2 Keep your elbows still to your sides throughout the movement.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Attach the bands to your feet. Lie on the floor with your hands behind your head, elbows wide and legs extended in front.
動作要領:
Squeeze your abs and rotate your upper body to bring one knee to the opposite elbow while fully extending the opposite leg.
2 Return to the starting position slowly and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your head in a natural position and do not strain or pull on your neck.
2 Lift your shoulder blades slightly off the floor.
3 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Attach the band low and stand back to it with feet shoulder width apart. Bend at your waist to hold the handles between your knees with arms extended.
動作要領:
Squeeze your glutes and tighten your lats.
Pull the band through your legs and drive your torso upward until standing up straight.
Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Position your hips between the level of shoulders and knees at the starting position.
2 Brace the abs to support your straight back throughout the movement.
3 Do not pull upward using your arms or shoulders.
4 Do not thrust your hips forward at the top position.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作: Stand with one foot forward and place the band under the midfoot. Hold a handle in each hand in an underhand grip with elbows tucked to your sides.
動作要領:
1 Curl the band up until your forearms touch your chest.
2 Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps.
3 Lower the band to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your chest up and eyes looking forward throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌, 肩膀, 胸部
準備工作:
Lie prone on the floor with feet together.
Place a band behind your back and under your hands. Extend your arms with palms slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and bend the elbows to lower your body down until your chest almost touches the floor.
2
Exhale and raise your body back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not fully extend your arms.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
3 Do not let your chest touch the floor.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 腿部：小腿肌, 腿部：腿後肌群
準備工作: Place an object under your belly to elevate your lower body and lie face down. Attach the band around your ankles and straighten your legs together.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your hamstrings to curl your legs up and raise your heels toward your hips, keeping your thighs and hips on the object.
2 Hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示: 1 Do not lock out your knees at the bottom.

重點部位: 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Place the band under one midfoot. Begin on all fours with knees hip-width apart and hands holding the handles under your shoulders.
動作要領:
Stretch and kick one leg back until your thigh is parallel with the floor.
2
Squeeze your glutes and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
4
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your pelvis staying pointed toward the ground.
2 Keep your torso steady with a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and place the band under your midfoot. Bend your waist at 90 degrees to hold the handles with palms facing backward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and bend your elbows to lift the
handles as much as possible.
2 Squeeze your shoulder blades at the top for a few seconds. Inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Move the handles vertically.
2 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作:
Stand and take a step forward with one foot.
Place the band under the midfoot of the front leg. Hold the handles next to your shoulders with palms facing each other.
動作要領:
1 Inhale and lower the behind knee almost down on the floor and bend the front knee until the thigh is parallel to the floor.
2
Exhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not let your front knee go over your toes.
2 Do not let your back knee touch the floor.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作:
Secure two bands to a low object and stand between them with feet shoulder width apart.
Bend over to hold the handles with the opposite hands. Extend your arms.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulder blades together to raise your arms.
2 Hold for a few seconds when your arms are parallel to your shoulders.
3 Inhale and lower your arms to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your elbows and knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Secure one band under your midfoot with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the handles in an overhand grip with arms extended and hands
next to your thighs.
動作要領:
Exhale and curl the handles up to your shoulders bending at the elbows.
2 Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your biceps when the handles reach the shoulder level.
3
Inhale and lower the handles back to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your wrists straight throughout the movement.
2 Do not swing the handles down.
3 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作:
Sit down and secure the band under one foot.
Rest one forearm on your thigh with the wrist ahead of the knee. Hold the handle with an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Extend the curled wrist and pull the handle upwards until you feel a stretch in the working arm.
2 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Use the opposite hand to secure the exercised forearm.
2 Keep your thighs and the exercised forearm parallel to the floor.
3 Keep your working elbow and wrist at the same height during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：下背部, 腿部：腿後肌群, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand up straight and place the band under your midfoot. Bend at the elbows and hold the handles across the shoulders with palms facing each other.
動作要領:
1 Hinge forwards from your hips and slightly bend in your knees until your upper body is parallel to the floor. Feel the stretch in your lower back and hamstrings.
2 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Keep your head, spine and neck in line throughout the movement.
2 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the handle with one hand and palms facing downward. Bend the arm at 90 degrees at shoulder level.
動作要領:
1 Rotate the forearm upward until the forearm is vertical to the floor.
2
Return to the starting position slowly and switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not tilt the working forearm to the side.
2 Keep your working upper arm parallel to the floor throughout the movement.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作:
Secure the band to a high object. Kneel down on one knee. Hold handles with hands shoulder width apart in an overhand grip.
Extend your arms upward.
動作要領:
1 Contract your lats and bend your elbows to pull the handles down to your shoulders.
2 Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not rely on the mechanical impulse to assist the movement.
2 Keep the upward movement controlled to avoid pulling yourself out of position.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: Secure the band to a high position and kneel down back to it. Lean slightly forward and hold the handles in a narrow underhand grip in front of your shoulders.
動作要領:
Exhale, squeeze your abs and bend at your waist to bring your torso towards your thighs.
2 Pause at the bottom for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Crunch your upper body down using your abs rather than pulling the handles down with your hands.
2 Keep your core braced and hips still during the exercise.

動作名稱: 過頭三頭肌伸展-彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Take a step forward and bend your knees slightly. Hold the handles behind the back of your head in an overhand grip with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your upper arms still and in line with your body.
2 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
3 Do not shrug your shoulders throughout the movement.
4 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Secure the band to a high object. Sit on a bench and hold handles with hands in a close underhand grip. Extend your arms upward.
動作要領:
1 Contract your lats and bend your elbows to pull the band down to your chest.
2 Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Lean slightly backward and do not arch your back during the movement.
2
Keep the upward movement controlled to avoid pulling yourself out of position.

準備工作: Secure the band to a high object. Sit on a bench and hold the handles with your hands in a close neutral grip. Extend your arms upward
動作要領:
1 Contract your lats and bend your elbows to pull the band down to your chest.
2 Pause for a few seconds and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Lean slightly backward and do not arch your back during the movement.
2 Keep the upward movement controlled to avoid pulling yourself out of position.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Attach the bands to your feet. Lie flat on the foor with your arms fully extended overhead and legs extended in front.
動作要領:
Squeeze your abs to lift one arm and the opposite leg simultaneously to meet at the
тор.2 Return to the starting position slowly and complete alternating between left and right.
關鍵提示: Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Stretch your arms and hold two handles of the band in front of your chest.
動作要領:
1 Squeeze your upper back and extend the band to your sides at the shoulder height.
2 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.
2 Keep your chin tucked and elbows slightly bent throughout the movement.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：前臂, 手臂：肱二頭肌
準備工作:
Sit on a bench and step one foot on the band.
Lean forward and extend one arm to hold the handle in a neutral grip. Rest the elbow against your thigh.
動作要領:
1 Curl the band up towards your shoulder.
2 Squeeze your biceps and hold for a few seconds at the top position.
3
Lower the band to the starting position and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Stabilize your body by supporting the torso with your free hand on the thigh.
2 Keep your upper arm still during the exercise.

動作名稱: 髖內收肌群運動-彈力帶
重點部位: 腿部：內收肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Attach one end of the band to an object and the other end around your ankle. Stand tall sideways to the object and hold it to stabilize.
動作要領:
1 Move your working leg toward and across the standing leg.
2 Slowly return to the starting position and repeat.
3
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
Do not use momentum to lift or swing your leg.
Keep your upper body straight and stationary during the exercise.
Keep your hips and shoulders squared front.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Stand upright and attach one end of the band to one ankle. Shift your weight to the opposite leg. Rest your hands on an object to support you.
動作要領:
1 Bring your attached knee up until the thigh is parallel to the floor.
2 Lower your knee back to the starting position and repeat.
3 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not swing your leg back to create momentum to perform the motion.
2 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.

重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌
準備工作: Secure the band to a high object and stand with feet shoulder width apart. Stretch your arms and hold the handles in both hands with an overhand grip.
動作要領:
Bend the elbows and pull the handles towards your face until your hands are beside your ears.
2 Return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1
Keep your elbows higher than your forearms during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand on the band with feet shoulder width apart. Put the band under your midfeet and hold a handle in each hand in front of your thighs in an overhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and lift the handles straight forward to the height of your head.
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your arms straight and elbows slightly bent during the exercise.
2 Change the way you grip to emphasize different muscle trainings.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱二頭肌, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Stand with feet shoulder width apart and bend over. Extend your arms and hold the ends of a band in both hands. Secure the band under midfoot.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your lats muscle to lift the band up toward your rib cage.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, slowly lower the band to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your upper arms steady by your sides.
2 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Secure the band to a high position and stand facing it with feet hip width apart. Hold the handles over the chest with palms facing forward and elbows against your body.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and pull the handles down towards your thighs until your arms are fully extended.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep your upper arms steady by your sides.
2 Lean slightly forward and keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Stand with feet hip-width apart on the band and bend at the hips. Hold the handles in an underhand grip. Bend your arms and tuck elbows to your torso.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands backwards until your arms are straight.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep your elbows still and close to your sides throughout the movement.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 肩膀
準備工作: Stand with one foot on the middle of the band ahead of the other. Hold the handles with arms bent at 90 degrees at your sides and palms facing forward.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and squeeze your shoulders to press the handles vertically until your arms are straight overhead.
2
Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Lean slightly forward on your front leg during the exercise.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Stand with your midfoot shoulder width apart on the band. Hold the handles behind your shoulders with palms facing forward and arms bent at your sides.
動作要領:
1
Inhale and squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2 Hold for a few seconds to feel the contraction.
3 Exhale, drive through the heels and midfoot to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.
5 Make a vertical movement with the handles, do not tilt the arms.

重點部位: 背部：背部, 腿部：股四頭肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Secure the band to an object. Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Hold the handles and keep your arms straight in front of your body.
動作要領:
1
Squat down until your thighs are parallel to the floor.
2
Push through the heels and midfoot to stand up, and squeeze your lats to pull the handle toward your rib cage.
3 Repeat slowly.
關鍵提示:
1 Keep the tiptoes in the same direction as your knees.
2 Do not let your knees go over your toes.
3 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
4 Keep your glutes, quadriceps and hamstrings engaged.
5 Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Sit on the bench and place your hands on the bench by your sides. Attach the band to the frame of the bench and the other end to one ankle.
動作要領:
Exhale and extend your working knee until the leg is parallel to the foor.
2 Pause for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Inhale, bend the knee to the starting position and repeat.
4
Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your knees at the top.
2 Keep a straight back during the exercise.

重點部位: 腿部：外展肌, 腿部：臀肌
準備工作: Attach one end of the band to an object and the other end around your ankle. Stand tall sideways to the object and hold it to stabilize.
動作要領:
1 Lift your working leg straight out to the side as far as possible.
2 Pause for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Lower your working leg to the starting position and repeat.
4 Switch to the other side and repeat the same repetitions.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not use momentum to lift or swing your leg.
2 Keep your upper body straight and stationary during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部, 腿部：股四頭肌
準備工作: Attach the handles to your feet. Lie flat on the Hoor with your arms fully extended overhead and legs extended apart in front.
動作要領:
Exhale and raise your arms and legs simultaneously to meet at the top.
2 l
Pause for a few seconds, inhale and return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
Do not let your legs touch the ground when lowering them.
2 Keep a braced core during the exercise.

器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：前臂
準備工作:
Sit down and secure the band under one foot.
Rest one forearm on your thigh with the wrist ahead of the knee. Hold the handle with an underhand grip.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and curl your working wrist up.
2 Pause for a few seconds at the top position.
3 Inhale and return to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Use the opposite hand to secure the exercised forearm.
2 Keep your thighs and the exercised forearm parallel to the floor.
3
Keep your working elbow and wrist at the same height during the exercise.

動作名稱: 仰臥肱三頭伸展-彈力帶
器材: 平板椅, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 手臂：肱三頭肌
準備工作: Secure a band around a bench and lie on it with feet on the floor. Hold the handles in an overhand grip with arms bent and elbows lifted.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and extend your elbows to press your hands up until your arms are straight.
2 Pause for a few seconds, inhale, return to the starting position slowly and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1 Do not lock out your elbows at the top.
2 Keep your upper arms still during the exercise.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

器材: 引體向上單槓, 握把彈力帶
重點部位: 肩膀, 背部：斜方肌, 背部：背部
準備工作: Hitch the band to the bar and pull two ends to your thighs. Hold the bar with palms facing forward, hands slightly wider than shoulder width apart.
動作要領:
1 Exhale and bend your elbows to raise your body up until your chin is aligned with the bar.
2 Pause for a few seconds and squeeze your back.
3
Inhale and lower your body back slowly to the starting position and repeat.
關鍵提示:
1
Contract your shoulder blades to reduce the stress on the shoulder joints.
2 Keep your knees slightly bent throughout the movement.
3
Keep a straight back and braced core during the exercise.

重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: 1) 地面防滑、手肘下可墊毛巾 2) 肩在肘/手腕正上方 3) 腳與髖同寬（初學可略寬）4) 先做 1–2 次吐氣「肋骨回收」找核心張力
動作要領: 1) 進入平板：頭—胸—骨盆成一直線 2) 以小步讓手（或前臂）向前/向側移動一步，再把另一手跟上 3) 全程骨盆水平、腰椎中立，身體平行移動 4) 每走 2–4 步可停 1 秒重置張力
關鍵提示: 1) 吐氣肋骨回收→核心先上鎖再移動 2) 地板推開：肩胛穩定，避免聳肩夾肩 3) 骨盆不晃：想像端著一杯水 4) 步幅小、速度慢、品質優先 5) 腰痠/肩壓大：縮短距離、改膝支撐或前臂版本

動作名稱: 完整空心圓木 (Hollow Body Rock)
重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: 1) 仰臥，膝蓋先彎曲備用 2) 吐氣肋骨回收，讓腰背貼近地面 3) 先用「Hollow Hold」靜止 10–20 秒確定能穩住，再進入搖擺
動作要領: 1) 進入空心：肩胛微離地、下背貼地，骨盆後傾維持 2) 雙手過頭、雙腳伸直離地（初學可抬高角度或屈膝） 3) 以身體整體像「圓木」前後小幅搖擺：從肩胛到臀部一起滾動 4) 全程不允許腰椎離地或肋骨外翻
關鍵提示: 1) 腰背貼地是底線：一旦腰離地立刻降低難度（屈膝/抬高手/腳） 2) 搖擺幅度小、節奏穩，不用甩 3) 以吐氣維持肋骨回收 4) 若下背壓迫感：先回到 Hollow Hold 或 Dead bug

動作名稱: 地面 L-Sit 嘗試 (Floor L-Sit)
重點部位: 腹部
準備工作: 1) 坐姿，雙手放在髖旁地面（手指可向前或微外） 2) 肩膀下沉、手掌「推地」建立支撐 3) 先做「單腳抬起」或「屈膝支撐」確認骨盆能離地
動作要領: 1) 雙手推地，肩胛下壓（遠離耳朵）並讓臀部微離地 2) 先抬一腳→再抬另一腳；或雙膝屈曲同時抬（tuck L-sit） 3) 逐步把膝蓋伸直、腳尖前伸形成 L 形 4) 全程胸口穩定、肋骨回收，避免塌肩與腰椎過度拱起
關鍵提示: 1) 推地＋肩下沉是關鍵：想像把地面推開、肩膀放進口袋 2) 先 tuck 再伸直：直腿抬不起屬正常，先用屈膝版本累積時間 3) 腳尖往前、膝蓋伸直來自髖屈＋核心，不靠聳肩代償 4) 手腕不適：改用拳頭支撐或墊毛巾，並縮短時間
